examples: Acetylcholine is also the principal neurotransmitter in all autonomic ganglia.
The role of acetylcholine in the brain is not a new area of research.
It is a competitive antagonist for the muscarinic acetylcholine receptor.
In the progression of Alzheimer's the brain suffers a significant decrease in the production of acetylcholine.
Another approach to cognitive enhancement, says Dr Robbins, is through a neurotransmitter called acetylcholine.
